word: H184 - אָוָה - ʼâvâh - aw-vaw' - Point out

sections.paragraph:
Original: אוה

Transliteration: 'âvâh

Phonetic: aw-vaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sign, mark, describe with a mark
    1. (Hithpael) to measure, mark out, mark you out

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 41

Part(s) of speech: Verb
